auth.otp_sent: A verification code has been sent to your email.
auth.otp_expired: Code expired. Request a new one.
auth.domain_rejected: This assessment is currently available for team members at {domains}. Contact your administrator if you believe you should have access.

briefing.welcome_message: This assessment measures how you think, not what you know. There are no trick questions and no specialized knowledge required.
briefing.what_to_expect_formats: Mix of question types: single-select, multi-select, drag-to-order, and short written responses
briefing.rule_no_back: You cannot go back to previous questions once you move forward
briefing.rule_timers: Some questions have visible timers; others have a hidden time limit — you'll get a brief warning before time runs out
briefing.rule_auto_advance: If time runs out on a question, your current response is submitted automatically
briefing.rule_single_sitting: The assessment must be completed in a single sitting
briefing.rule_no_resources: Please do not use external resources or AI tools during the assessment

section_intro.questions_count: This section has {count} questions and takes approximately {minutes} minutes.
section_intro.format_note: You'll see {types} questions in this section.
section_intro.tone_s1: These are quick questions — trust your instincts.
section_intro.tone_s4: Some questions are quick, others require deeper analysis.
section_intro.tone_s2: Take your time. Think about the full picture before answering.
section_intro.tone_s5: Compare what was asked for with what was produced.

question.drag_instruction: Drag the steps into the correct order

section_transition.take_a_moment: Take a moment. When you're ready, the next section is {section_name}.

completion.submitted_message: Your responses are being evaluated. Results will be reviewed by your administrator.
completion.no_scores_note: You will not see scores on this screen.
completion.thank_you: Thank you for completing the CORE Assessment.

errors.connection_lost: Connection lost — your responses are saved locally and will sync when the connection is restored.
errors.session_timeout: Your assessment session expired and was submitted with the responses you completed.
errors.leave_warning: Your assessment is in progress. Are you sure you want to leave?
errors.server_error: We're having trouble submitting your response. It has been saved locally. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.other_device: This assessment is already in progress on another device.
